case_title: THUY NGA LE ET AL VS. ALMA MARIE HEYMAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100.00) SERVED JUN-25-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALEXANDER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2021 - JUDGMENT. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF THUY NGA LEE REPRESENTED BY KRISS MIRANDA, PROPERTY AGENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER HEYMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR KRISS MIRANDA TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF THUY NGA LE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, THUY NGA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE, THUY NGA LE, TRANG T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALEXANDER $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, COST TO REPLACE CAMERAS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.00 FILED BY LE, THUY NGA LE, TRANG T. AS TO DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RE; CHANGE OF ADDRESS AND UPDATING NAME OF DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT ALMA MARIE HEYMAN TO BE CORRECTED TO REFELECT DEFENDANT'S CORRECT NAME AS ALEXANDER HEYMAN . (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALEXANDER
